TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Zaid Abdul-Aziz == sukay niza Amilika a tademaw, tatama, nalecuhan i 4 a bulad 7 a demiad, 1946 a mihcan. ngangan niza ci Zaid Abdul-Aziz, u miunduay ciniza. u kanas-mali mimaliay. Zaid Abdul-Aziz i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 5, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput.
S.PHON: == zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz == sukaj niza amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad * a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan. ŋaŋan niza ʦi zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz, u miunduaj ʦiniza. u kanas-mar~ɾi mimar~ɾiaj. zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦinʦinnati *ojar~ɾs putiput.
S.FORM: == Zaid Abdul-Aziz == sukay niza Amilika a tademaw, tatama, nalecuhan i 4 a bulad 7 a demiad, 1946 a mihcan. ngangan niza ci Zaid Abdul-Aziz, u miunduay ciniza. u kanas-mali mimaliay. Zaid Abdul-Aziz i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 5, namapili' tu nu Cincinnati Royals putiput.
S.PHON: == zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz == sukaj niza amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad * a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan. ŋaŋan niza ʦi zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz, u miunduaj ʦiniza. u kanas-mar~ɾi mimar~ɾiaj. zaid abdur~ɾ-aziz i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦinʦinnati *ojar~ɾs putiput.
